title: solanum nigrum subsp. villosum
intro: Solanum nigrum subsp. villosum, also known as woolly nightshade, is a plant species within the Solanum nigrum complex, characterized by its hairy stems and leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of solanine, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Solanum nigrum subsp. villosum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and exhibit antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
